case_title: RASHEED OTEY VS. MICHAEL FOUNTILA (MAKE "M" SHINE)

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-05-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OTEY, RASHEED IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MICHAEL FOUNTILA (MAKE "M" SHINE) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-05-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-05-2018 BY PRO TEM JUDGE: DAVID FLEISIG. PLAINTIFF RASHEEN OTEY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MICHAEL FOUNTILA DBA MAKE "M" SHINE IS PRESENT AND REPRESENETED BY MICHAEL FOUNTILA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRO TEM JUDGE: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY OTEY, RASHEED AS TO DEFENDANT MICHAEL FOUNTILA (MAKE "M" SHINE) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-05-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 30.00 - SERVED AUG-10-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MICHAEL FOUNTILA (MAKE "M" SHINE)
